description_long: This is a two-story wooden cabin with a modern, rectangular design and a prominent, steeply pitched gable roof clad in dark metal panels. The facade features large, floor-to-ceiling windows arranged symmetrically on both levels, allowing for ample natural light and scenic views. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a warm, natural appearance. A covered porch is visible on one side, supported by wooden posts and partially enclosed with railings. The roof includes several skylights, enhancing interior illumination. The rear side of the cabin has a more utilitarian look, with smaller windows and a vertical window stack near the center.
description: A modern, two-story wooden cabin with a steep dark gable roof, large symmetrical windows, and a covered side porch. The exterior features horizontal wood cladding and multiple skylights.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with two levels of large, symmetrical windows and the covered porch on the right side.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the expansive dark gable roof with a central skylight and the porch area beneath the overhang.
description_view_2: The rear angled view mirrors the front's window arrangement but emphasizes the porch's enclosure and the cabin's depth.
description_view_3: The back view displays smaller, asymmetrically placed windows and a vertical window stack, with no porch visible.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with wide overhangs, dark metal cladding, and multiple skylights
attribute_window_arrangement: Symmetrical arrangement of large, floor-to-ceiling rectangular windows on the front and rear facades, with smaller, asymmetrical windows and a vertical window stack on the back side
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on the right side of the front facade, opening onto the covered porch
